title: 72 Pack Plastic White Round Dinner Plates, 10" Disposable Wave Plates Elegant Heavy Duty Serving Dishes for Party, Wedding, Thanksgiving, Christmas
features: Value Pack: You will get 72pcs white plastic dinner plates, 10 inches standard size, which can hold appetizers, desserts and foods, suitable for various parties

Elegant design: Delicate wavy rim design dinnerware, simple and luxurious, look like chinaware, which can be paired with any style cutlery, suitable for all party occasions. High quality plastic cutlery is not easy to bend, hand washed and reused
Premium Material: These round plates are made of heavy-duty plastic, 100% food-grade and BPA-free, sturdy and durable, won't scratch and break easily. Meet your daily use

Convenient and reusable: The white wave plates suitable for parties of various themes. If you dont want to have to deal with cleaning up and washing dishes, these reusable disposable plates are a good option, just enioy your party

Perfect for Party: Add a touch of sophistication to your event with these elegant disposable dinner plates. Suitable for most occasions, Picnic, BBQ, Wedding, Party, Family Reunion, Easter, Thanksgiving, Christmas and Everyday Use
